creator: eb30750@gmail.com
text:
I was able to successfully install the virtualbox-ose-kmod and virtualbox-ose-additions packages but not virutalbox-ose.  The error statement upon existing is:  lib/python2.6......./loader.pyc  pkg_add: leave_playpen: can't chdir back to ''

There were several dependent packages that were off patch.  Used force to install.

Fix: 

Need new virtualbox-ose package that include this dependency
